title: World Spawn
body:
# The Arbor

New players will spawn in at the top of a little treehouse cabin. 
A worldmap of the surrounding region is just in view to the north.

title: Treasure Maps!
body:
# Treasure Maps

I guess technically these are called explorer maps...

they popped up after my vibe coding pass was working. 
i think they could be separated out onto their own layer of this map if that is desired. 

otherwise itd be simple to remove them from the output entirely.

title: Nether Map
body: Probably would do away with the nether map layer... thats what we're looking at here.

title: Nether Portal
body:
# Nether Portal Markers

## SLT

A whole layer with all known Nether portals on the surface, and that wouldnt be complete without the NetherRail 3 digit shortcodes!

title: LGT Portal
body:
# LGT Portal

this version of the map was made before the lighthouse was even developed i think. wowzers!
